subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-07-07 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: the Cause has many enemies! The Baha'is must be very happy. The priests and the Ulemas, the Rabbis and the Mobeds are attacking the Cause
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
